subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-01
subcodes.first_line: From the age of 30 I have had a slow pulse. All others have a pulse rate of about 75 to 80 and therefore greatly wonder about my pulse rate.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از سن سی سالگی نبضم مطئی است هر کس دیگر باشد ٧٥ - ٨٠ خواهد بود
